step-001.title: Go module initialization and project scaffolding

step-002.title: Domain error types and value objects

history.detail: Feature state reconstructed from artifacts. No source code exists. Starting from step-001.
Step 001 implemented and approved. go.mod, go.sum, cmd/http-lambda/main.go created. go build and go vet pass.
Step 002 implemented and approved. Domain errors (ValidationError, ErrNotFound, ErrConcurrencyConflict, ErrDuplicate) and ProductType value object. 100% coverage.
Step 003 implemented and approved. Client, Asset, Position, ProcessedCommand entities with constructors, reconstitution, invariants, mutation methods. 52 tests, 100% coverage.
